subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and He hath revealed for thee that wherefrom the dwellers of the All-Highest Paradise have inhaled the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد قد ذکر اسمک لدی المظلوم و انزل لک ما وجد عنه اهل الفردوس الاعلی عرف
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @belief and denial
